nasb.text: And he even tried to desecrate the temple; and then we arrested him. [We wanted to judge him according to our own Law.

esv.text: He even tried to profane the temple, but we seized him.

cnv.text: 他還意圖污穢聖殿，我們就把他捉住。

ccb.text: 企图玷污圣殿，被我们抓住了。我们想按照犹太律法处置他，

csbs.text: 他甚至试图玷污圣殿，我们就把他拘捕了。我们本来想按照我们的律法审判他，
